Download UKB LD

Source: R/download_UKB_LD.R
download_UKB_LD.Rd

Download UK Biobank Linkage Disequilibrium, pre-computed in 3Mb windows by the Alkes Price lab (Broad Institute).

Usage

download_UKB_LD(
  LD.prefixes,
  locus_dir,
  bucket = "s3://broad-alkesgroup-ukbb-ld/",
  background = TRUE,
  force_overwrite = FALSE,
  nThread = 1,
  verbose = TRUE,
  ...
)

Arguments

locus_dir

Storage directory to use.

bucket

Character string with the name of the bucket, or an object of class “s3_bucket”.

force_overwrite

Overwrite existing file.

nThread

Number of threads to parallelise across (when applicable).

verbose

Print messages.

...

Arguments passed on to downloadR::aws

input_url

URL to remote file.

output_path

The file name you want to save the download as.

On this page
